name: io.github.dojogenesis/mcp
description: Practice library for coding agents: skill search/invoke, seed patches, scout, reflect, ADR writer

environmentVariables.name: DOJO_SKILLS_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to a CoworkPlugins checkout for the full first-party practice library; 35 bundled skills are used when unset

environmentVariables.name: DOJO_ADR_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Directory where dojo_log_decision writes ADR markdown (default ./decisions)
